indicators.name: long corridor with columns
indicators.rationale: The long corridor with columns is an open, throughfare-prone layout incompatible with sleep.

indicators.name: high ceiling with paintings
indicators.rationale: High ceiling with paintings is visually stimulating and incompatible with sleep.

indicators.name: no visible bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: No visible bed or resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This is a long, open corridor with high ceilings and paintings, making it visually stimulating and incompatible with sleep. There is no visible bed or resting surface, making it unsuitable for sleep.
